item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-11 - Today's Summary
item.description: AI agent frameworks remain the dominant category, with 4 repos averaging 1,048 daily stars, led by sustained hot projects. Coding/SWE agents follow closely with 3 repos at 726 daily stars. A notable breakout is the Front-End Checklist (72,888 stars, 3.9x acceleration), now exposed via MCP for AI agents, signaling that developers are retrofitting existing tools for agent compatibility. Netdata (79,113 stars, 2.3x acceleration) also breaks out, likely due to its ML-powered anomaly detection appealing to AI ops. The cross-source signal from Apache Burr (appearing on both GitHub and Hacker News) reinforces the agent infrastructure theme. The quietness in RAG and MCP categories today may indicate a temporary shift in focus toward agent frameworks and observability. Top projects: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN, soxoj/maigret, thedaviddias/Front-End-Checklist, netdata/netdata, stas00/ml-engineering, automazeio/ccpm, addyosmani/agent-skills, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools, ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis, nexu-io/open-design, sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

item.title: [sustained_hot] masterking32/MasterDnsVPN (+515 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: MasterDnsVPN is an advanced DNS tunneling VPN designed to bypass censorship and survive total internet blackouts, outperforming DNSTT and SlipStream with lower overhead, higher speed, and extreme packet-loss stability. Why it matters: The repo gained 515 stars in the last 24 hours, reaching 5,470 total stars with only 17 open issues, indicating strong community validation. The sustained hot trend (acceleration 1) suggests steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike, making it a reliable project for developers seeking proven censorship circumvention tools. Developer insight: For AI developers, this signals a growing demand for robust, low-level networking solutions that can operate under extreme constraints, potentially inspiring integration with AI-driven traffic optimization or adaptive routing systems. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] soxoj/maigret (+693 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Maigret collects a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites, no API keys required. Why it matters: With 693 stars in the last 24 hours and 32,342 total stars, Maigret is experiencing sustained high attention. Its acceleration ratio of 1 indicates steady, organic growth rather than a sudden spike, but the consistent daily star gain and recent release (within 30 days) keep it top-of-mind for the OSINT community. Developer insight: For AI developers, Maigret's optional AI analysis mode demonstrates how LLMs can summarize raw OSINT findings into actionable reports. This pattern — combining scraping with AI summarization — is a growing trend in investigative tooling. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] thedaviddias/Front-End-Checklist (+22 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A comprehensive front-end quality checklist with 385 rules, now exposed via MCP for AI agents. Why it matters: With 72,871 stars and a sudden breakout acceleration of 2.3 (high), the project is experiencing a sharp uptick in attention. The 24h star delta of 18 and 7d delta of 82 indicate sustained interest, while the acceleration suggests a recent catalyst. The MCP server integration makes it immediately useful for AI agents, aligning with the current surge in agentic workflows. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward structured, machine-readable best practices that AI agents can consume directly. Developers should expect more projects to expose rule sets via MCP or similar protocols, enabling automated, context-aware code review. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] netdata/netdata (+16 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI DevTool / Observability Description: Netdata is an open-source, real-time infrastructure monitoring platform with per-second metrics, zero-configuration setup, and built-in ML-powered anomaly detection. Why it matters: With 79,113 stars and a sudden acceleration ratio of 2.3 (high), Netdata is experiencing a breakout moment. The 24-hour star delta of 16 and 7-day average of 8.3 indicate sustained, growing interest. This acceleration suggests a recent surge in attention, possibly driven by new AI features or community momentum. Developer insight: For AI developers, Netdata signals a shift toward edge-based, real-time anomaly detection that doesn't require centralizing data. This reduces latency and privacy concerns, making it attractive for AI-driven operations and automated incident response. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+7 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: A comprehensive open book of methodologies, tools, and commands for training and fine-tuning large language and multi-modal models. Why it matters: With 18,015 stars and a sudden acceleration ratio of 2.9 (high), the repo is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour star delta of 20 and 7-day average of 6 indicate a sharp increase in attention, likely driven by the growing need for hands-on ML engineering guidance as LLM training becomes more accessible. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward open, community-driven knowledge sharing in ML engineering, reducing the barrier for smaller teams to adopt large-scale training practices. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] automazeio/ccpm (+5 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CCPM is an Agent Skill that turns AI coding agents into structured project managers using GitHub Issues and parallel Git worktrees for spec-driven, multi-agent development. Why it matters: With 8,166 stars, a 7-day average delta of 2.4, and a sudden acceleration to 2.4 (high), CCPM is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour delta of 4 and 7-day delta of 17 indicate sustained, accelerating interest. This is not a flash spike but a rapidly growing project with strong community signals. Developer insight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] addyosmani/agent-skills (+3634 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A production-grade pack of 24 structured skills and slash commands that encode senior engineering workflows for AI coding agents. Why it matters: The repo has exploded from 0 to 51,894 stars with a 24h delta of 2,051 and a 7d delta of 3,844. The acceleration ratio is 4 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is not gradual growth — it's a viral spike driven by the release of a comprehensive, well-documented skill pack for multiple agent platforms. Developer insight: The project signals a shift from ad-hoc agent prompting to structured, skill-based agent programming. It suggests that the future of AI-assisted development lies in reusable, verifiable skill packs rather than raw LLM prompts. Developers should consider adopting or contributing to such skill ecosystems. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+748 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for performance and prefix-cache stability. Why it matters: With 21,105 stars, a 24-hour delta of +748, and a 7-day average of +527 stars per day, this project is experiencing sustained high growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.5 indicates strong, steady momentum without sudden spikes, suggesting organic adoption. It ranks in the top 2-3 in velocity across Agents, LLMs, and CLI categories on OOSMetrics. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward specialized, model-native agents that optimize for specific API features (like prefix caching) to reduce operational costs, and a preference for single-binary distribution over npm-based tools. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools (+551 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A massive, community-curated collection of system prompts, internal tools, and AI models from dozens of popular AI coding assistants and platforms. Why it matters: The repo has exploded to 139k stars with a 24h delta of 278 and a 7d delta of 549, showing sustained high velocity. The acceleration ratio of 6.1 indicates a sudden breakout, likely driven by viral sharing across developer communities and social media. The star history chart shows a hockey-stick growth pattern, making it one of the fastest-growing AI repos on GitHub. Developer insight: The massive interest signals a strong developer appetite for transparency and customization in AI tools. Expect more open-source efforts to replicate or improve upon proprietary system prompts. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis (+530 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets with automated daily reports and multi-channel push notifications. Why it matters: The repo is experiencing a sudden breakout with 530 stars in the last 24 hours, a 7-day average of 230.6 stars/day, and an acceleration ratio of 3.4 (high). Total stars are 42,063 with 39,895 forks, indicating massive community interest. The recent release and active commits suggest ongoing development. Developer insight: Signals a growing demand for AI agents that automate financial analysis and decision support. Developers can leverage this trend by creating similar tools for other domains (e.g., real estate, crypto) with multi-source data fusion and push notifications. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+878 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +878，总 stars 63,268，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills (+172 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Installable GitHub library of 1,500+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, and more. Includes specialized plugins, installer CLI, bundles, workflows, and official/community skill collections. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +172，总 stars 40,353，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low
